lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, hello. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Olga.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you out here?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Werewolf? No werewolves here, pup.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... I never mentioned werewolves though...

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Oh... Well, I was hoping to join a new crew, but I had no luck at Phasmatys. The ghosts there didn't seem to like me much... I thought maybe someone here would have a boat instead, but it seems not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I suppose it's not much of a bustling port. Still, I hope you find a crew soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. I don't think I'm ready for that kind of thing yet though.

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Right... Not very helpful to me then, are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you'd like to join my crew?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: I don't think so. You're not fit to lead a pack.

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Hmm... Okay, I'll join your pack, but don't make me regret it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I hope you find a new crew soon.

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, hello. Still here then?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Yes, still trying to find a new crew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to hire a crew to sail with myself. I don't think I'm ready for that kind of thing yet though.

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Right... Not very helpful to me then, are you?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: Fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You sure you're not feeling any stronger than that?

lines.speaker: Oarswoman Olga
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.
